description: CompositionWashed blue jeans made of cotton and lycra blend fabric, that has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, brand tab appliqued on the right pocket at the back and metal zipper and button closureFitMid-rise, Slim fit, Straight legWash careMachine wash cold Wash separately using mild detergentDo not bleachTurn inside out before washing and dryingUse warm ironDo not wringTumble dry or flatDry in shadeIf you're a denim person, these washed blue jeans from wrangler are perfect for you. Mid-rise, with a great slim fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with funky t-shirts and canvas shoes for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 44"Height: 6', Waist: 32", Hips: 40"
